title: psephellus adjaricus
intro: Psephellus adjaricus, also known as Caucasian dandelion or Ajarian psephellus, is a plant species in the sunflower family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psephellus adjaricus include its potential to treat gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of health conditions.
